name: BBKNN (Batch-Balanced KNN)

batch_key.guidance: The obs column containing batch labels.

neighbors_within_batch.guidance: Number of nearest neighbors to find within each batch. Lower values enforce more mixing.

validation.check: Batch mixing should improve. BBKNN replaces the neighbor graph entirely.

notes: BBKNN replaces the sc.pp.neighbors step. Do NOT run sc.pp.neighbors after BBKNN — proceed directly to clustering and UMAP. Fast and simple but less powerful than Harmony or scVI for complex batch effects.
